body.title: CLOSED: Reference chat agent skeleton in agent_datacenter
body.result: Reference chat agent at agent_datacenter/examples/chat_agent/agent.py — direct anthropic SDK, optional db.py memory, clean shutdown (commit ff13324)
body.description:
agent_datacenter has no 'hello world' showing how to build an agent on top of it. A reference chat agent demonstrates proper patterns: OR connection, db.py memory persistence, channel read/send, structured prompting — without LangChain, LlamaIndex, or framework cruft. Goal: runnable in < 5 minutes on a box with agent_datacenter installed. The 'OpenClaw without crappy patterns' starting point for third parties or for spinning up new specialized agents on the rack.

**Affected files:** New agent_datacenter/examples/chat_agent/agent.py; agent_datacenter/examples/chat_agent/README.md (justified exception to no-README rule — this IS the reference documentation).
**Design rules:** No TheIgors imports. No LangChain/LlamaIndex/framework imports. Direct anthropic SDK or OR HTTP calls only. Uses agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/db.py for memory.
**Scope boundary:** IN: minimal working chat loop, memory persistence via db.py, channel integration. OUT: voice, multi-agent orchestration, production hardening, GUI.
**Test plan:** python agent_datacenter/examples/chat_agent/agent.py runs, accepts stdin, responds, saves to db.py memory, sends to channel. Smoke test: mock OR call, verify memory write + channel send.
**Pass condition:** A developer with agent_datacenter installed can cd examples/chat_agent && python agent.py, send a message, and see a response with memory saved — in under 5 minutes from zero.
